provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human female combat medic in her 30s with close-cropped hair and a calm focused expression, wearing a charcoal tactical undersuit with a cream medical vest over it marked with a red cross on the back, a compact trauma pack on her right hip and a drug dispenser unit on her left, medical scanner hanging from a lanyard, nitrile gloves tucked into every pocket, blood-resistant boots, she looks like someone who works calmly while people are screaming

judgment.explanation: Combat medic in tan medical vest with red crosses over black tactical suit. Trauma pack, drug dispenser. Ship doorway. Exactly right — calm competence.
